KelmaMobile for AltStore

KelmaMobile 1.1.6 for iOS, distributed through AltStore. AltStore signs the app with your own Apple ID.

Add Kelma Source to AltStore Download IPA

Manual source URL

https://kelma.tech/altstore/source.json

Notes

  • Free Apple IDs generally need to refresh sideloaded apps every 7 days.
  • Version 1.1.6 uses KelmaSync's UTC clock so new Immersion cards are not hidden by a skewed local timestamp.
  • The current bundle id is tech.kelma.mobile.dev.
